title: The Next Threat Emerges
description: On pages 17–24, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the next threat emerges.
scene: The scene focuses on the next threat emerges, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Diamante, I'm entrusting this with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The island has come into view

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UHO!! What a rough- looking island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've come to save you!! Kanjuro!!

summary: The Next Threat Emerges. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
